prompt: I have a Next.js app. What should preflight check before I start validation? What would cause a CLEAR vs BLOCKED verdict?
expected_output: Should enumerate: Node.js installed, npm installed, node_modules exists, dev server port available, .env.local configured. CLEAR if all pass. BLOCKED if Node missing or major port conflict. Should explain: 'preflight runs first, 5-10 min, saves 30 min of wasted validation time on missing dependencies.'
